ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the experiment */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the experiment */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the RL agent used */,
  "env_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment used */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used for the experiment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments related to the experiment */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the experiment data is publicly accessible */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project or research initiative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_env_id FOREIGN KEY ("env_id") REFERENCES environments ("env_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timesteps" (
  "timestep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timestep */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the timestep belongs to */,
  "timestep" INTEGER /* Timestep number */,
  "episode" INTEGER /* Episode number */,
  "avg_action_dist" TEXT /* Average action distribution at the timestep */,
  "obs" TEXT /* Observations at the timestep */,
  "human_obs" TEXT /* Human observations at the timestep */,
  "original_rewards" REAL /* Original rewards at the timestep */,
  "actions" TEXT /* Actions taken at the timestep */,
  "rewards" REAL /* Rewards received at the timestep */,
  "logstd_action_dist" TEXT /* Log standard deviation of the action distribution at the timestep */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the timestep data was recorded */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action taken at the timestep */,
  "is_terminal" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the timestep is the last in an episode */,
  "episode_reward" REAL /* Cumulative reward for the episode at this timestep */,
  "episode_length" INTEGER /* Length of the episode at this timestep */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timestep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timesteps_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_type" TEXT /* Type of RL agent (e.g., DQN, PPO) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the agent */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the agent */,
  "architecture" TEXT /* Architecture of the agent (e.g., neural network layers, types) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the agent is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "env_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "env_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the environment */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the environment is currently active */,
  "max_steps" INTEGER /* Maximum number of steps allowed in the environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("env_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist, admin) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the configuration belongs to */,
  "config_key" TEXT /* Key of the configuration parameter */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was recorded */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the configuration is the default for the experiment */,
  "config_group" TEXT /* Group related configurations together */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_configurations_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the log belongs to */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log entry */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log entry (e.g., INFO, ERROR) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was recorded */,
  "log_source" TEXT /* Source of the log entry (e.g., RL agent, environment, system) */,
  "log_context" TEXT /* Additional context for the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., reward, loss, accuracy) */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., points, percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was recorded */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Brief description of changes made in this version */,
  "is_released" INTEGER /* Indicates whether this version has been released for public use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
